channel.title: Python on CONMAJIA
channel.description: Recent content in Python on CONMAJIA

item.title: ebay Item Extractor
item.description: This is a more complicated example of web crawler compared to what is demonstrated in the Web Crawler Introduction. Ebay is an amazing e-commercial website containing huge amounts of goods trading on it. Thanks to Python, it is possible to extract every single detail of items on Ebay. NOTE requests.get can only fetch statically served pages, which means any late-binding dynamically generated pages may suffer a unsuccessful retrieval. Generate URL with Search Keywords To crawl a website, a correct resource location is required to fetch web pages containing desired contents.

item.title: Web Crawler Introduction
item.description: Web crawlers, usually known as web spiders, are automated data samplers and remote content fetchers. These programmed agents retrieve web contents and store them for future analytic usage. A typical crawler loads web pages from the internet, abstracts contents of specified fields in page HTML sources, and constructs these data into a JSON object or other formats of storage. In this scenario, the crawler substitutes web browsers operated by human clients.
